overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person night driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit metropolis. The player navigates through steamy streets, passes corporate military vehicles, and enters a covered commercial parking structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with steam vents and corporate presence

events.description: begins driving through steam-filled street with MILITECH vehicle visible ahead
navigates through intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes
turns right at intersection, passing neon-lit commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets, navigating around a large MILITECH armored vehicle

notable_agents.action: MILITECH armored vehicle moving slowly ahead, blocking part of the lane

tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through a steamy cyberpunk street at night. A large MILITECH armored vehicle dominates the center of the road ahead, while neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the background. The driver navigates through an intersection marked with yellow crosswalk stripes, turning right past commercial buildings with ornate street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach with palm tree lining

events.description: exits dense commercial district into wider highway-style road with overpasses
lighting shifts to warmer orange street lamps as vehicle passes under overpass
passes under large concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating along wider city highway, passing under overpasses and alongside concrete barriers

tall palm trees lining the left side of the highway
curved elevated roadway merging from the right
grey concrete dividers separating lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions onto a wider highway-style road lined with palm trees and dominated by massive concrete overpasses. The lighting shifts to warmer orange sodium street lamps as the car passes under the overpass structure. Concrete barriers line the right side of the road, and an elevated highway ramp is visible merging from the right.

events.description: enters industrial area with graffiti-covered walls and warehouse buildings
makes left turn at intersection, navigating around construction barriers
passes large digital billboard displaying advertisements

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial streets, making a left turn while avoiding orange construction barriers

entered.detail: large warehouse building covered in colorful street art and graffiti
concrete wall with prominent pink and purple graffiti tags
large illuminated digital advertisement screen mounted on building
bright orange and white striped construction fencing

segments.scene_description: The drive continues through an industrial district characterized by graffiti-covered warehouse buildings and concrete walls tagged with colorful street art. Orange construction barriers line the right side of the road as the vehicle makes a left turn at an intersection. A large digital billboard glows in the distance, and the area is lit by red-tinged street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial approach to destination building with number 10 signage

events.description: begins following a white van approaching the destination
approaches building with illuminated number 10 sign overhead
lighting becomes more intensely neon with purple storefront signs

agents.ego_description: following a white van through commercial streets, approaching a building marked with number 10

large digital screen showing advertisement with woman's face
extensive wall covered in detailed graffiti murals

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a white commercial van through increasingly commercial streets, approaching a building marked with a prominent illuminated number 10 sign suspended overhead. The right side of the street features extensive graffiti murals and a large digital billboard displaying an advertisement. Neon purple storefront signs become visible as the destination nears.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial parking garage with neon ceiling lighting

events.description: enters covered parking structure with neon-lit ceiling
slows down while navigating through covered commercial area
ambient light shifts to intense cyan and pink neon from ceiling fixtures

agents.ego_description: slowing down to enter the covered parking garage, navigating toward a stopping point

entered.detail: large covered structure with open entrance leading into commercial parking
rows of bright cyan and pink neon tubes illuminating the ceiling
floating holographic display showing commercial advertisement
modern building with reflective glass windows and neon interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered commercial parking structure, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered environment illuminated by intense cyan and pink neon ceiling lights. A holographic advertisement floats on the right side, while the left features a modern glass building facade. The driver slows down as they navigate the final approach, with yellow crosswalk stripes marking the entrance to the parking area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a dense, steamy urban intersection into a wide, industrial highway corridor. It begins by navigating a rain-slicked cyberpunk street, weaving past a massive Militech armored vehicle beneath the glow of neon skyscrapers and ornate street lamps. As the car turns right across yellow crosswalk stripes, the tight city architecture gives way to a more open roadway. The scene then shifts as the vehicle passes under massive concrete overpasses, where the cool neon lighting transforms into the warm orange glow of sodium street lamps. Finally, the camera glides along a highway lined with palm trees and concrete barriers, passing an elevated ramp merging from the right.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a gritty industrial district that gradually transitions into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial hub and a sheltered parking facility. It begins by navigating past graffiti-covered warehouses and orange construction barriers under red-tinged street lamps before making a left turn toward a glowing digital billboard. As the vehicle follows a white commercial van, the environment shifts toward a more commercial atmosphere characterized by purple storefront signs and a prominent illuminated number 10 sign suspended overhead. The scene then moves from the open street into a covered parking structure, where the lighting transforms into intense cyan and pink neon hues. Finally, the camera glides past a floating holographic advertisement and a modern glass facade, slowing down as it crosses yellow stripes to enter the sheltered area.
